programmes.show_description: Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
An hour from the kings of 80s synth - Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark.
A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With The Tourists, Elvis Costello, Dexy's, Dr Hook & Donna Summer.
Sixty minutes of lesser heard hits from 1980. Including AC/DC, Stray Cats, Jermaine Jackson, Gary Numan, Donna Summer and Gilbert O'Sullivan.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With The Tourists, Elvis Costello, Dexy's, Dr Hook & Donna Summer.

programmes.show_name: Gary Davies: Video Hall of Fame!
programmes.show_description: Gary Davies' 10-hour marathon celebrating the music video! It was a decade of visual innovation and all the key moments are here - from Peter Gabriel and Jacko to Eurythmics and Madonna.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Every one of these brilliant songs is a true '80s gem. Amazingly though, none of them ever made the UK Top 10. Great tunes from big names including Abba, INXS, Bon Jovi and more!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With The Tourists, Elvis Costello, Dexy's, Dr Hook & Donna Summer.
1980 was another top year in music, with pop and new wave rubbing shoulders with rock, reggae, synth and even a love song or two! Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.
1980 was another top year in music, with pop and new wave rubbing shoulders with rock, reggae, synth and even a love song or two! Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.
1981 was another top year in music, with the New Romantics and Synth Pop conquering the world and changing the sound of the chart forever. Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Kim Wilde, Cliff Richard, OMD, Duran Duran & Heaven 17.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Style Council, Boy George, Chris Rea, Billy Idol & Squeeze.
Sixty minutes of back to back UK chart runners-up from 1986 - including hit ladies Madonna, Sinitta, Kim Wilde and Su Pollard! With Mr Charts himself, Mark Goodier.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1986!
The Mission's gobby frontman with big, bold and ambitious 80s sounds that offered a true alternative to the ever present cheesy pop fare. From Joy Divison in 1980 to Electronic in 89.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
Pop legend Toyah brings 30 memorable videos featuring a cavalcade of clothing calamities from superstars including Bowie, Madonna, Adam Ant and many more in this crazy countdown!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Mr Favourite Shirts selects his Favourite Bands! Haircut 100's Nick Heyward with 25 classic groups from the first half of the '80s, including Altered Images, Heaven 17 and ABC.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Get the amps cranked up to 11 as Gary Davies is ready to rock with two hours of truly epic tracks! These are the 25 very best bands and artists that became '80s stadium superstars.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Paul Young, who has sung one or two himself, brings you 25 classic '80s hits that were all covers, including Whitney, Madness, Billy Idol and Simply Red. Some will really surprise you!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Remember top TV music show 'No Limits' back in the day? Jenny Powell is back, with two hours of only the very best that featured on that programme. Turn it up LOUD!
